description: You are a Network Engineer designing a WiFi upgrade. Create a coverage heatmap for an office floor plan in Diagrams.net (draw.io) using the floor plan image ~/Desktop/office_floorplan.png and the specifications provided in ~/Desktop/wifi_project_specs.txt. The diagram must be organized into three layers: a 'Floor Plan' layer for the background image, a 'Hardware' layer containing three Wireless Access Point icons at the specified locations, and a 'Coverage' layer showing semi-transparent signal range circles for each access point. Save the working file as ~/Diagrams/wifi_project.drawio and export the final heatmap as a PNG to ~/Diagrams/exports/wifi_coverage_map.png.
